---
title: "A Shilling Book of Golden Deeds - by Charlotte Mary Yonge(1864)"
sort_title: "Shilling Book of Golden Deeds - by Charlotte Mary Yonge(1864)"
year: 1867
slug: "a shilling book of golden deeds"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1867*



### **Online text of*****A Shilling Book of Golden Deeds****  
*  
This is a**Google scan of a Bodley copy**

### [Click here to read or download](http://books.google.com/books?id=GdgBAAAAQAAJ&printsec=toc#PPA3,M1)
